market_context: Markets showing positive momentum with pre-market futures up 1-2% after cooling Middle East tensions. Intel surged 13% yesterday on Apple partnership rumors, while energy stocks declined as oil prices fell on diplomatic progress.

predictions.reasoning: Pre-market futures up 1% with cooling Middle East tensions reducing geopolitical risk premium. Energy sector weakness offsetting tech strength suggests modest gains for the broad index.
Apple foundry partnership talks continue driving momentum after 13% surge yesterday. Retail enthusiasm evident but high forward P/E of 125x creates vulnerability if no concrete developments emerge.

Oil prices down 11.7% overnight as Middle East tensions ease with Trump pausing Strait of Hormuz operations. Energy sector faces continued pressure as diplomatic progress reduces geopolitical premium.
Nasdaq futures up 1.66% with tech momentum from Intel rally and strong Q1 earnings from major tech names. VIX declining suggests continued risk-on sentiment favoring growth stocks.

Disney reports earnings today with high expectations already priced in. Streaming competition remains intense and theme park attendance concerns persist, creating downside risk on any guidance disappointments.
